title: RCT Badges - PokeBadges Compat
description: Leaders from Radical Cobblemon Trainers will drop badges from the PokeBadges mod.
body:
![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_dbc5c04a-accd-4460-adef-7f52bf62a12e.png)

Radical Cobblemon Trainers × PokéBadges

A lightweight datapack for Radical Cobblemon Trainers that adds proper badge drops from the PokéBadges mod to gym leaders.

Each supported leader can drop their corresponding badge after being defeated, while advancement icons are also updated to match the correct badge items.

Features

  • Adds badge rewards to supported gym leaders
  • Uses the official badge items from the PokéBadges mod
  • Updates advancement icons to use the correct badge items
  • Lightweight integration with no extra gameplay changes

Requirements

  • Radical Cobblemon Trainers
  • PokéBadges

PokéBadges mod page:
https://modrinth.com/mod/pokebadges

How it works

This datapack patches the individual leader loot tables from Radical Cobblemon Trainers to inject the matching badge items from PokéBadges.

It also updates the related advancement icons so the progression visuals correctly reflect the badge earned.

Installation

  1. Install the required mods
  2. Place the datapack in your world's datapacks folder or on your server
  3. Use /reload or restart the game/server

Notes

This datapack is focused only on badge integration for leaders. It does not add extra mechanics, rebalance trainers, or modify unrelated systems.
